title: AgentDef Agent Identity (Descriptive)
description: Descriptive schema documenting the expected markdown sections in agent.md. This schema is NOT consumed by the validator — it exists as a reference for tooling authors. The validator checks for the required Role section by parsing the markdown directly.

sections.description: Expected top-level markdown sections in agent.md.

_validation_notes.description: agent.md is primarily a markdown file. This schema defines the expected structure for tooling that parses it. The validator checks for the presence of a Role section in the markdown content rather than validating YAML frontmatter.
